---
name: Contract Update / Addition
about: Propose a new contract or update to an existing one
title: '[CONTRACT] '
labels: contract
assignees: ''
---

## Contract Name

`CONTRACT-[NAME].md` (new) or existing contract to update.

## Why Update?

- [ ] Source standard has been updated (new version released)
- [ ] New relevant standard published
- [ ] Threshold needs adjustment based on new research
- [ ] Coverage gap identified

## Source Standard

| Standard | Reference | Version/Date | Tier |
|----------|-----------|-------------|------|
| | | | |

**Important**: All contract rules must trace to a Tier 1 or Tier 2 source. No "best practice" without citation.

## Proposed Change

What should be added, changed, or removed?

## Verification

How can the change be verified (observable truth)?

## Backward Compatibility

Does this change break existing projects using this contract?
- [ ] Yes (explain)
- [ ] No
